Attorney, Tessa R. Lessner of the law offices of Lewis Brisbois (415-438-6681) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

Attorney, Karen Labat of the law offices of Miller Law Associates APC (213-493-6400) appears by telephone as counsel for defendant/opposing party

The parties report to the court that they have reached a settlement in this action.

The Court vacates the tentative ruling.
